message:
Fix gt handoff using stale TMUX_PANE after session respawn

When a tmux session is respawned, child processes (like Claude Code)
retain the old TMUX_PANE env var, but tmux has assigned a new pane ID.
This caused "can't find pane: %NNNNN" errors on handoff.

Now resolves the live pane ID from tmux via getSessionPane() and warns
when the env var is stale. Applied to both runHandoff and runHandoffCycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
